LanguageData.MustPlaceOnStandable: Cannot teleport: Target cell is not standable.
LanguageData.TeleportMultiplayerSyncUnavailable: World teleport is unavailable because Multiplayer sync registration failed.
LanguageData.TeleportModeGizmoDesc: Choose whether this ability targets the current map or world long-range destinations.
LanguageData.TeleportSwitchedCurrentMap: Teleport mode switched to current map.
LanguageData.TeleportSwitchedLongRange: Teleport mode switched to long-range world teleport.
LanguageData.TeleportModeRequiresMapTarget: This mode only supports current map targeting.
LanguageData.TeleportModeRequiresWorldTarget: This mode only supports world long-range targeting.
